description: A plain, undesigned candid press/event photograph (no on-image text or graphic overlays) from the same White House coal event. President Donald Trump is seated at a desk in the gold-curtained East Room, looking down and signing a document with a pen. Surrounding and standing behind him are numerous attendees: coal miners in hard hats (white and yellow safety helmets) and work clothes, plus several men in business suits (one with gray hair in a blue suit at left, others at right). A row of American flags lines the back wall, a bronze coal-miner statue stands on a pedestal at right, and the round Seal of the President of the United States is visible on the desk front. This is a routine bill/order signing photograph for the coal-industry event referenced in the tweet, not a designed meme or poster.
